texto: Christians who say we are not to judge others are only partially correct! Judging rightly is what Jesus commands. Love and truth are “The Commanded Conjoined Twins” for Jesus Followers
autor: they must never be separated if we wish to obey Jesus’ “Platinum Rule”!

Judging rightly is what…” articula reflexao, gary-patton, jesus em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
